subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be the Glory of God and His praise, and His mercy, and His favor
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک بهاء الله و ثنائه و رحمته و رضوانه یا من آمن بالله و ایقن بایاته و صدق
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God
